Write an expression for the number of passengers on the train now.

Mo asks some people if they prefer sun, rain or wind.\\
The pie chart shows the results.\\[0.3cm]

\quad 45 more people prefer wind than rain.\\[0.3cm]
Work out how many people prefer sun.\\[2.8cm]

Xie changes 2000 dollars into krona.\\

1 dollar \( = \) 0.615 euros

1 krona \( = \) 0.087 euros\\

\quad Use the exchange rates to calculate how many krona she receives.\\
Give your answer correct to the nearest krona.\\[2.8cm]

  krona

Calculate the average speed of the car in km/h.

(a) Clare invests \$12\,000 for 3 years at a rate of 8\% per year compound interest.

Calculate the value of her investment at the end of the 3 years.
Give your answer correct to the nearest \$10.

(b) Zak invests \$560 for one year.
After one year his investment is worth \$630.

Calculate the percentage increase.
